TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_David_Benoit, title = David_Benoit, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Benoit} }

S.FORM: David Benoit sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 5 ru 9 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Louisiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 203 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 110 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

David Benoit sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 5 ru 9 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Louisiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 203 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 110 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *a*i* βenoit s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa louis~ɕiana, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
